must_detect.matched_text:
Pr o j e c t S E A f o a m — Singapore Strategic Investment Term Sheet — c o n f i d e n t i a l draft (for internal wall‑crossed recipients only).
Parties: Orchid Tide Pte. Ltd. (investor) and Telaris GreenGrid Limited (Mainboard issuer on the Singapore Exchange); Financial Adviser: Nimbus Quanta Capital Pte. Ltd.
Structure: Acquisition of 51% of issued shares (primary placement + secondary purchase) and issuance of S$40,000,000 sustainability‑linked convertible bonds; subject to Exchange notifications and any required filings with the Singapore financial regulator.
Consideration: S$1.28 per share cash; earn‑out up to S$12,000,000 tied to FY2027 ESG KPIs (Scope 2 intensity ≤ 38kgCO2e/MWh, verified by an external assurer), noting non‑public monthly emissions baselines in the data room.
Confidentiality/MNPI: This term sheet contains information not generally available; Orchid Tide will maintain an insider list (incl. Mr. Jun‑Wei Koh and Ms. Priya Narayanan) and implement c l e a n s i n g via an issuer‑portal announcement within 48 hours post‑signing.
Information barriers: Our Singapore law‑firm team will operate under an information‑barrier memo segregating the DPT/crypto desk; no DPT trading or tipping based on transaction MNPI is permitted.
DPT/custody: Target presently holds ~S$3.2m in digital payment tokens in a cold wallet (public key 0x1a2B...eF90) solely for treasury trials; completion conditional on a Payment Services Act (Singapore) scope assessment and cessation plan, with no selective disclosure of wallet movements.
Cybersecurity: Target represents no material cyber incident since 1 Jan 2024; any personal data breach will be notified per PDPA and the technology risk management guidelines of the Singapore financial regulator; buyer warranty insurance to carve‑out known vulnerabilities disclosed in “CY‑Annex.pdf”.
Funding/offer exemptions: Equity placement to institutional/accredited investors relying on SFA ss.274/275; underwriting by Nimbus Quanta Capital; directors and KMPs to observe blackout windows and no‑tipping prohibitions under the Exchange Listing Rules.
Governance: Board to include one Orchid Tide nominee (Mr. Jun‑Wei Koh, Director; contact: junwei.koh@orchidtide.example.com); PDPA notice: personal data will be processed to maintain insider lists and for regulatory filings.
Conditions precedent: Exchange waivers (if any), independent financial adviser opinion, regulatory notifications regarding DPT exposure, completion of information‑barrier setup, and expressly no MAC condition applies to the Target’s ordinary course performance.
Conduct of business: No selective disclosure of performance metrics before cleansing; employees to comply with pre‑results blackout (2 weeks before half‑year, 1 month before full‑year); all wall‑crossed persons to sign IB‑Acknowledge A/C SG‑IB‑9_7.
Exclusivity/termination: 60‑day no‑shop; reverse break fee S$1,500,000; long‑stop date 30 Nov 2026; governing law Singapore; binding provisions limited to confidentiality, costs, exclusivity, and governing law.
